title: aquilegia atrata var. macrantha
intro: Aquilegia atrata var. macrantha, also known as the red columbine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Aquilegia atrata var. macrantha include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its alkaloid and glycoside content. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
